indicators.name: Nominal GDP
indicators.description: Total value of goods and services produced at current prices

indicators.name: Real GDP Growth Rate
indicators.description: Year-on-year growth rate of real GDP adjusted for inflation

indicators.name: GDP Per Capita
indicators.description: Nominal GDP divided by total population

indicators.name: Headline Inflation (CPI)
indicators.description: Year-on-year change in the Consumer Price Index (all items)

indicators.name: Core Inflation
indicators.description: CPI excluding volatile food and energy items

indicators.name: Food Inflation
indicators.description: Year-on-year change in food component of CPI

indicators.name: Unemployment Rate
indicators.description: Percentage of the labour force that is unemployed

indicators.name: Exchange Rate (USD/NGN)
indicators.description: Official exchange rate of Nigerian Naira to US Dollar

indicators.name: Parallel Market Rate (USD/NGN)
indicators.description: Unofficial parallel (black market) exchange rate

indicators.name: Exchange Rate (EUR/NGN)
indicators.description: Official exchange rate of Naira to Euro

indicators.name: Exchange Rate (GBP/NGN)
indicators.description: Official exchange rate of Naira to British Pound

indicators.name: Monetary Policy Rate (MPR)
indicators.description: CBN benchmark interest rate for monetary policy

indicators.name: 91-Day Treasury Bill Rate
indicators.description: Yield on 91-day Nigerian Treasury Bills

indicators.name: 364-Day Treasury Bill Rate
indicators.description: Yield on 364-day Nigerian Treasury Bills

indicators.name: Total Exports
indicators.description: Total value of goods exported

indicators.name: Total Imports
indicators.description: Total value of goods imported

indicators.name: Trade Balance
indicators.description: Exports minus imports

indicators.name: Government Revenue
indicators.description: Total federally collected revenue

indicators.name: Government Expenditure
indicators.description: Total government spending

indicators.name: Foreign Reserves
indicators.description: Gross external reserves held by the CBN

indicators.name: External Debt
indicators.description: Total external debt stock of the Federal Government

indicators.name: Current Account Balance
indicators.description: Current account balance of the balance of payments

indicators.name: Crude Oil Production
indicators.description: Average daily crude oil production including condensates

indicators.name: Bonny Light Crude Price
indicators.description: Price of Nigerian Bonny Light crude oil

indicators.name: NGX All-Share Index
indicators.description: Nigerian Exchange Group All-Share Index

indicators.name: NGX Market Capitalization
indicators.description: Total market capitalization of all listed equities on NGX

indicators.name: Purchasing Managers Index
indicators.description: Stanbic IBTC PMI — above 50 indicates expansion

events.title: President Tinubu Inaugurated
events.description: New administration takes office with reform agenda

events.title: Fuel Subsidy Removal
events.description: Government removes petrol subsidy, prices rise from ~NGN185 to NGN500+

events.title: FX Unification
events.description: CBN unifies multiple exchange rate windows; Naira depreciates sharply

events.title: MPR Raised to 18.75%
events.description: CBN raises monetary policy rate by 25bps

events.title: MPR Raised to 18.75%
events.description: MPC holds rate steady at September meeting

events.title: MPR Raised to 22.75%
events.description: CBN raises MPR by 400bps in aggressive tightening

events.title: Naira Redesign Aftermath
events.description: Continued effects of late-2022 naira redesign policy on cash supply

events.title: Naira Crashes to 1500/USD
events.description: Naira hits record low on official market amid FX scarcity

events.title: Minimum Wage Increase
events.description: New national minimum wage of NGN70,000 takes effect

events.title: Tax Reform Bills Expected
events.description: Proposed tax reform legislation under consideration
